message:
feat(workers): Implement deploy-binary command for rch-wkr deployment

Completes the workers deploy-binary command with full functionality:
- Finds local rch-wkr binary in common locations
- Checks remote version via SSH
- Deploys via scp to ~/.local/bin (no sudo required)
- Verifies installation via health check
- Supports --force to overwrite matching versions
- Supports --dry-run for preview

Also includes previously added workers discover command implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
